ham.subject: Your CloudDesk Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

This is a friendly reminder that your CloudDesk subscription is set to renew on 15 May 2026. To maintain uninterrupted service, please review your account details and confirm payment.

If you wish to adjust your plan or cancel the renewal, simply log into your dashboard at <URL> and update your billing information.

Thank you for choosing CloudDesk.

Best regards,
CloudDesk Billing Team
support@clouddesk.com

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Delivery Fee Payment Required Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #123456789) was marked as a missed delivery. If the package is not delivered within the next 48 hours, FedEx will impose an additional delivery fee of $25.00.

To avoid further charges and ensure delivery, please complete the payment immediately by verifying your account at <URL>. The payment will be processed securely and your shipment will be scheduled for delivery.

Failure to pay within the specified time frame will result in the cancellation of your shipment and forfeiture of the package.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
service@fedex.com
